allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add git repo setup checklist \(Section 01\)

Covers repository configuration essentials:
- Clone-and-run requirements \(GIT-001 to GIT-003\)
- Branch protection rules \(GIT-005\)
- Branch strategy and cleanup \(GIT-006 to GIT-009\)
- CI/CD linting and testing \(GIT-010, GIT-011\)
- Documentation requirements \(GIT-012, GIT-013\)
- Local development with Docker Compose \(GIT-014\)
- Repository cleanliness and .gitignore \(GIT-015 to GIT-020\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add dependencies & code quality checklist \(Section 02\)

Covers dependency management and tooling:
- Security scanning and maintenance \(DEP-001 to DEP-003\)
- TypeScript and strict mode requirements \(DEP-004\)
- Linting configuration \(DEP-005\)
- pnpm package manager preference \(DEP-006\)
- Turborepo for monorepo structure \(DEP-007\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /Users/rodric/Claude/personal/ultimate-cto-checklist commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Implement lib/checklist.ts data layer with TDD

Add TypeScript data layer for reading and parsing CTO checklist content
from the filesystem. Handles both old and new YAML formats found in the
checklist sections.

Features:
- listSections\(\): Scans checklist directory, returns section summaries
- getSection\(slug\): Loads full section with items and guide markdown
- Handles two YAML formats \(new object-based and old scalar-based\)
- Normalizes item fields \(description/summary, optional category\)
- Simple in-memory caching \(60s TTL in production, none in dev\)
- Robust error handling with descriptive messages
- Full TypeScript type safety

Testing:
- 29 comprehensive tests covering all functionality
- Tests validate against real checklist data \(18 sections\)
- TDD approach: tests written first, all passing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
